sentences.arabic: تُمَثِّلُ الْمَقْلُوبَةُ فِي الثَّقَافَةِ الشَّامِيَّةِ لَوْحَةً فَنِّيَّةً مِعْمَارِيَّةً، حَيْثُ تُرَصُّ طَبَقَاتُ الْبَاذِنْجَانِ وَالزَّهْرَةِ بِعِنَايَةٍ فَائِقَةٍ تُحَاكِي رَصَّ الْحِجَارَةِ فِي الصُّرُوحِ الْقَدِيمَةِ.
sentences.translation: Maqluba u šamskoj kulturi predstavlja arhitektonsko umjetničko djelo, gdje se slojevi patlidžana i karfiola slažu s izuzetnom pažnjom koja oponaša slaganje kamenja u drevnim zdanjima.
sentences.translationEn: Maqluba represents an architectural artistic masterpiece in Levantine culture, where layers of eggplant and cauliflower are stacked with exquisite care that mimics the laying of stones in ancient monuments.

sentences.arabic: وَيَتَطَلَّبُ إِعْدَادُ هَذَا الطَّبَقِ صَبْرًا أَيُّوبِيًّا، إِذْ يَنْبَغِي تَرْتِيبُ الْمُكَوِّنَاتِ فِي نَسَقٍ هَنْدَسِيٍّ يَضْمَنُ تَمَاسُكَهَا عِنْدَ لَحْظَةِ الْقَلْبِ الْحَاسِمَةِ.
sentences.translation: Priprema ovog jela zahtijeva beskrajno strpljenje, jer sastojke treba rasporediti u geometrijski niz koji garantuje njihovu koheziju u presudnom trenutku prevrtanja.
sentences.translationEn: Preparing this dish requires Job-like patience, as the ingredients must be arranged in a geometric pattern that ensures their cohesion at the decisive moment of flipping.

sentences.arabic: عِنْدَمَا يَتَسَلَّلُ بَرِيقُ الْكُرْكُمِ الذَّهَبِيُّ إِلَى حَبَّاتِ الْأُرُزِّ، يَتَحَوَّلُ الْقِدْرُ إِلَى كَنْزٍ دَفِينٍ يَنْتَظِرُ مَنْ يَكْشِفُ عَنْ أَسْرَارِهِ الْمَطْمُورَةِ.
sentences.translation: Kada se zlatni sjaj kurkume uvuče u zrna riže, lonac se pretvara u skriveno blago koje čeka onoga ko će otkriti njegove zakopane tajne.
sentences.translationEn: When the golden shimmer of turmeric seeps into the rice grains, the pot turns into a hidden treasure waiting for someone to reveal its buried secrets.

sentences.arabic: إِنَّ لَحْظَةَ قَلْبِ الْإِنَاءِ لَيْسَتْ مُجَرَّدَ خُطْوَةٍ فِي الطَّبْخِ، بَلْ هِيَ ذُرْوَةُ الدَّرَامَا الْمَطْبَخِيَّةِ الَّتِي تَحْبِسُ أَنْفَاسَ الْحَاضِرِينَ تَرَقُّبًا لِلِاسْتِقَامَةِ الْمَنْشُودَةِ.
sentences.translation: Trenutak prevrtanja posude nije samo korak u kuhanju, već vrhunac kulinarske drame koji prisutnima oduzima dah u iščekivanju željene uspravnosti.
sentences.translationEn: The moment of flipping the pot is not just a step in cooking, but the climax of culinary drama that holds the breath of those present in anticipation of the desired uprightness.

sentences.arabic: وَمَا إِنْ يُرْفَعُ الْقِدْرُ حَتَّى يَنْبَثِقَ هَرَمٌ غِذَائِيٌّ مُتَنَاغِمٌ، تَتَوَّجُهُ قِطَعُ اللَّحْمِ الْمُحَمَّرَةِ وَالْمُكَسَّرَاتِ الْمُقَرْمِشَةِ الَّتِي تَلْمَعُ كَالْجَوَاهِرِ.
sentences.translation: Čim se lonac podigne, izranja harmonična prehrambena piramida krunisana komadima pečenog mesa i hrskavim orašastim plodovima koji blistaju poput dragulja.
sentences.translationEn: As soon as the pot is lifted, a harmonious nutritional pyramid emerges, crowned with pieces of browned meat and crunchy nuts that shine like jewels.

sentences.arabic: يَسْتَحْضِرُ هَذَا الطَّعَامُ رُوحَ الْأَرْضِ وَبَرَكَةَ الزَّيْتُونِ، مُجَسِّدًا ارْتِبَاطَ الْإِنْسَانِ الْأَزَلِيَّ بِتُرَابِ وَطَنِهِ وَمَحَاصِيلِ بَيَادِرِهِ.
sentences.translation: Ova hrana priziva duh zemlje i blagoslov maslina, utjelovljujući vječnu povezanost čovjeka s tlom svoje domovine i prinosima svojih gumna.
sentences.translationEn: This food evokes the spirit of the land and the blessing of olives, embodying man's eternal connection to the soil of his homeland and the harvests of his threshing floors.

sentences.arabic: فَالْمَقْلُوبَةُ لَيْسَتْ وَجْبَةً دَسِمَةً فَحَسْبُ، بَلْ هِيَ رَمْزٌ لِلْمُقَاوَمَةِ الثَّقَافِيَّةِ وَالِاحْتِفَاءِ بِالْجُذُورِ الْعَمِيقَةِ فِي وَجْهِ مُتَغَيِّرَاتِ الْعَصْرِ.
sentences.translation: Maqluba nije samo obilan obrok, već simbol kulturnog otpora i slavljenja dubokih korijena pred promjenama vremena.
sentences.translationEn: Maqluba is not just a hearty meal, but a symbol of cultural resistance and a celebration of deep roots in the face of the changing times.
